# ISwr.DeleteAsync method

Sends a DELETE request and invalidates the URL's cache entry plus any additional keys.

```csharp
public Task DeleteAsync(string url, params string[] additionalInvalidateKeys)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| url | The URL to DELETE. Also used as the primary cache key to invalidate. |
| additionalInvalidateKeys | Additional cache keys to evict after the request succeeds. |
